response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience, primarily in web technologies, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, but falls significantly short of the mandatory requirements for this role. They lack the required 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows and do not possess the necessary domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience spanning over 15 years.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated leadership through founding projects and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ development experience on Windows (only ~6 months listed).
Missing required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
Core technical stack is misaligned, leaning heavily towards web technologies and DLang rather than C++ and SQL Server/Oracle.
